ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anxcye/anx-reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anxcye/anx-reader
Language: dart
Featuring powerful AI capabilities and supporting various e-book formats, it makes reading smarter and more focused.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI wearables. Put it on, speak, transcribe, automatically

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cateners/tiny_computer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cateners/tiny_computer
Language: dart
Click-to-run debian 13 with desktop environment on android for Chinese users, with fcitx pinyin input method and some useful packages preinstalled. You don't need to install Termux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ImranR98/Obtainium
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ImranR98/Obtainium
Language: dart
Get Android app updates straight from the source.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KRTirtho/spotube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KRTirtho/spotube
Language: dart
🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Predidit/Kazumi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Predidit/Kazumi
Language: dart
基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕，支持实时超分辨率。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: astubenbord/paperless-mobile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/astubenbord/paperless-mobile
Language: dart
An (almost) fully fledged mobile paperless client.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bggRGjQaUbCoE/PiliPlus

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bostrot/wsl2-distro-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bostrot/wsl2-distro-manager
Language: dart
A GUI to quickly manage your WSL2 instances

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cake-tech/cake_wallet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cake-tech/cake_wallet
Language: dart
The open source repository for Cake Wallet, a noncustodial multi-currency wallet, and Monero.com, a noncustodial Monero-only wallet. Need help? Check out https://docs.cakewallet.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chen08209/FlClash
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chen08209/FlClash
Language: dart
A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dchristl/macless-haystack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dchristl/macless-haystack
Language: dart
Create your own AirTag with OpenHaystack, but without the need to own an Apple device

ns0:entry.ns0:title: deretame/Breeze
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/deretame/Breeze
Language: dart
Breeze 是哔咔(PicACG/bika)与禁漫（禁漫天堂，jm）的第三方安卓客户端，采用 Flutter 开发。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gokadzev/Musify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gokadzev/Musify
Language: dart
Unlock the full potential of music: Stream effortlessly with one app!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jiangtian616/JHenTai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jiangtian616/JHenTai
Language: dart
A cross-platform manga app made for e-hentai & exhentai by Flutter

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/khanifzyen/dart-basics
Language: dart

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kodjodevf/mangayomi

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

A comic app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zarzet/SpotiFLAC-Mobile
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarzet/SpotiFLAC-Mobile
Language: dart
Mobile version of SpotiFLAC written in Flutter, powered by a Go backend for high performance. Download Tracks in true FLAC from Tidal, Qobuz, & Amazon Music - no account, no ads, no subscription.
